title: Project Alpha may be losing momentum
summary: Project Alpha appears connected to an active quarterly goal, but recent meaningful activity is absent.
why_it_matters: Project Alpha supports an active goal, so loss of momentum may create continuity risk.
why_now: No meaningful activity has been recorded for 18 days while the linked goal remains active.
uncertainty: The absence of activity may reflect an intentional pause rather than abandonment.
trust_notes: Trust QA allowed surfacing. No sensitive personal context is included.
